Birth & Postpartum Support

Your body was made for this.

You were not made to do it alone. Holistic doula care in Middle Tennessee for women who want deeper preparation, steady support, and a more intentional path through pregnancy, birth, and postpartum.

Book a Complimentary Connection Call Download Birth in Belief

There is a knowing inside you that standard care does not reach.

You already sense it, that quiet certainty that your body understands birth. That you were designed for this.

What you need is not someone to manage your birth. You need someone to guard the space while you do what you were made to do.

The Amana Philosophy

Support that honors your body, your faith, your intuition, and your lineage.

Amana exists for the mother who is ready to reclaim her experience.

Amana offers education, steady support, and practical guidance so families can approach pregnancy, birth, and the early weeks of parenthood with clarity instead of fear. This care is rooted in a deep respect for physiologic birth, informed choice, and the Creator's design for the female body.

What AMANA holds

The foundations of care you will feel in every visit.

Faith-Rooted Presence

Grounded in the truth that the female body was intentionally designed. Every form of care offered here flows from that foundation.

Ancestral Wisdom

Herbal medicine, nourishing foods, and time-honored postpartum practices woven into modern support.

Healthcare Knowledge

Doula, midwifery, herbalism, and lactation training combined with health care experience, so you are never underprepared.

Services

Support shaped around pregnancy, birth, and the early postpartum weeks.

Whether you are preparing for birth or looking ahead to postpartum, Amana offers woman-centered support that helps you move through this season with more clarity, more peace, and more trust in the process.

Birth Support

For mothers who want more than the standard of care.

Intentional prenatal preparation, continuous labor support, and a calmer, more grounded birth experience for mothers in Middle Tennessee.

Explore Birth Support

Postpartum Care

Real recovery, not just occasional help.

Hands-on postpartum support designed to help you rest, recover, and feel more supported in the first weeks after birth.

Explore Postpartum Care

“She has given me all the tools and resources I need to do things differently this time, from a biblical and holistic perspective.”

Ajali H. · VBAC, Homebirth in Indiana

Hi, I’m Rachel

I support mothers who want to approach pregnancy, birth, and postpartum with trust rather than fear.

Most of the women I work with already know that birth is not an emergency, that informed consent matters, and that the body carries wisdom.

What they are seeking is steady support. Someone who can help them prepare, ask better questions, make aligned decisions, and feel more grounded in the process. That is the role I serve.

Read More About Rachel
